items.title: SEC Proposes New E-Delivery Approach to Make Information More Readily Accessible and Useful for Investors
items.raw_excerpt: The Securities and Exchange Commission today proposed Regulation E-Delivery, a new rule that would expand the ability of issuers, broker-dealers, investment advisers, and others to use electronic delivery to satisfy information delivery requirements…
